hero.pill_free: Free to download and use. Pro upgrade unlocks everything.
hero.subtitle: The GPS field companion built by a detectorist, for detectorists. Track your sessions, map your coverage, log every find, and keep your permissions in order — all in one app.
mapcompare.label: Interactive Views
mapcompare.description: Drag the slider to compare modern satellite imagery with historical surveyor maps. Spot the old homesteads, forgotten trails, and prime detecting spots hiding right in your backyard.
howitworks.label: Your Workflow
howitworks.description: SweepTrack covers every phase — not just the tracking part.
howitworks.step1_description: Check the detecting forecast for soil conditions. Pull up USGS historical maps to find old roads and buildings. Browse nearby sites for leads.
howitworks.step2_description: GPS tracks your every step across 4 map types. Perimeter guard keeps you inside your permitted zone. Log finds with photos and notes as you go.
howitworks.step3_description: Load past tracks on the live map to see exactly where you missed. Compare past sessions side by side. Export your data. Back everything up to Google Drive.
features.label: Features
features.description: Professional-grade tools packed into one app. From GPS tracking to session analytics, every feature is built for serious detectorists.
features.gps_description: See exactly where you've swung and where you haven't. Real-time satellite view with distance, speed, and heading so you never retrace your steps.
features.heatmap_description: Stop guessing which patches you missed. The coverage heatmap shows density by color — green means walked, red means hammered, empty means go back.
features.oldmap_description: Find where the old homesteads, roads, and schools used to be. Genuine 1800s USGS survey tiles layered onto your modern satellite view.
features.presets_description: Running a Deus II? Equinox 800? Simplex+? Load your machine's preset in one tap — 61 models across 12 brands, ready to go.
features.offline_description: No signal in the field? Download tiles before you leave home. 4 sources: Street, Satellite, Terrain, and Historical Topo.
features.perimeter_description: Draw the boundary of your permission on the map. Your phone vibrates when you're near the edge and alarms if you step outside.
features.analytics_description: Know which sites produce and which don't. Distance, finds, duration, averages, and personal bests across all your sessions.
features.export_description: Take your data anywhere. Export sessions as GPX, KML, or CSV — open in Google Earth, share with your club, or archive to your PC.
features.weather_description: Don't waste a trip. Check the Detecting Forecast before you drive — soil moisture, wind, and a 0-100 score tell you if it's worth going.
features.sites_description: Find your next prime spot. See churches, battlefields, old bridges, and Wikipedia landmarks around your position with distance and directions.
features.compare_description: Stack your last three visits to the same field and instantly see the gaps. Overlay mode or split-screen side by side.
features.backup_description: Phone dies? Upgrade? One-tap Google Drive backup saves every session, find, preset, and permission. Restore it all on any device.
faq.label: FAQ
faq.q1: How does the Permission Vault keep me from trespassing?
faq.a1: You add each landowner permission with their name, contact, approval status, expiry date, and the exact site boundary drawn on the map. The app shows which permissions are active, expiring, or expired. You can generate a PDF permission letter to share with landowners, and set calendar reminders before permits expire. Combined with Perimeter Guard, you get vibration and audio alerts if you wander outside your approved boundary.
faq.q2: How do historical maps help me find better spots?
faq.a2: The app overlays genuine USGS topographic survey maps from the 1800s onto your modern satellite view. You can see where old homesteads, schools, churches, roads, and settlements used to be — places that no longer exist on modern maps. These are prime detecting spots because people lived there, dropped things, and the sites are now empty fields. Adjust the overlay opacity to blend old and new.
faq.q3: What does the Detecting Forecast actually measure?
faq.a3: It pulls real-time weather data and generates a Detecting Score from 0 to 100 with a verdict: Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor, or Bad. The score factors in soil moisture (wet soil conducts signals deeper), wind speed, temperature, humidity, and precipitation. You can check any day up to a week ahead and search any location. Contextual tips explain why conditions are good or bad.
faq.q4: How do I know if I've already covered an area?
faq.a4: Three ways. The coverage heatmap shows a color-coded density overlay of your current session — green means lightly walked, red means hammered, empty means you missed it. Track overlay lets you load past sessions onto the live map so you can see exactly which strips you covered on previous visits. And session comparison lets you stack multiple visits to the same field and spot the gaps instantly.
faq.q5: What does the Measure tool do?
faq.a5: Tap the map to drop points and measure distance along a path with per-segment labels. Tap point 1 again to close it into a polygon — the app calculates perimeter and area in hectares or acres using real spherical geometry. You can drag vertices to edit, save measurements to the Library with a reverse-geocoded name, and convert any polygon into a Perimeter Guard boundary with one tap.
faq.a6: When you dig a target, tap the find button to drop a GPS-pinned marker. Pick one of 6 types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), set the depth on a 0-40 cm slider, and optionally add a name, value, weight, notes, a photo, and an audio recording. Every find is editable later. The photo gallery shows all your find photos in a grid, and find search lets you filter across sessions by name, type, or notes.
faq.q7: Does the app support my specific detector?
faq.a7: SweepTrack works with any metal detector — it's a GPS tracker and field toolkit, not a detector controller. As a bonus, it includes 61 preset templates across 12 brands (Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus). Save up to 10 custom configurations and share them via JSON export or QR code.
faq.q8: What's the difference between Free and Pro?
faq.a8: Free gives you GPS tracking on 3 map types, unlimited sessions, 5 finds, 1 preset, and basic tools like the compass, ruler, and back-to-start line. Pro unlocks everything: unlimited finds, 10 presets, measure tool, track overlay, heatmap, session comparison, session merging, perimeter guard, permission vault, historical maps, offline maps, detecting forecast, tide tables, cloud backup, night vision, coin caliper, all 12 themes, and full export. $19.99/year or $2.99/month with a 7-day free trial.
faq.q9: Does it work when I have no cell service?
faq.a9: Yes. Download map tiles before you leave home — Street, Satellite, Terrain, and Historical Topo are all available for offline use. GPS tracking runs entirely on your phone's hardware with zero internet needed. The only features that require a connection are the weather forecast, tide tables, and nearby sites lookup.
faq.q10: Is my detecting data private and safe?
faq.a10: All data lives on your device. No servers, no analytics, no ads, no tracking. Optional Google Drive backup stores an encrypted copy in your own Drive account — we never see it. Export your data as GPX, KML, CSV, or JSON anytime. You own everything.
pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.description: Use the core features forever at no cost. Upgrade to Pro to unlock the full arsenal.
pricing.free_description: Core GPS tracking, unlimited sessions, 5 finds, 1 preset, basic features.
pricing.pro_description: Everything. Unlimited. No ads. No limits.
cta.label: Almost There
cta.description: Free to download and use. Pro upgrade unlocks everything.
community.description: Share your finds, swap tips, and see what other detectorists are digging up. We're all in this together.
community.newsletter_heading: Want app updates and detecting tips?
community.newsletter_description: Be the first to know when SweepTrack launches.
community.facebook_desc: Join thousands of detectorists sharing finds, tips, and SweepTrack setups.
community.youtube_desc: Watch our bite-sized animated tutorials and mastering guides.
community.instagram_desc: Epic permissions, legendary finds, and behind-the-scenes.
community.x_desc: App updates, dev logs, and quick metal detecting news.
community.tiktok_desc: Trending detecting moments and rapid-fire tips.
community.reddit_desc: r/metaldetecting discussions, find IDs, and app feedback.
footer.description: The metal detecting companion app. GPS tracking, offline maps, cloud backup, and way more than we can fit in this footer.
blog.title: Guides & Tips
blog.subtitle: {count} articles covering every feature and technique.
blog.cta_beginners: More guides coming regularly. New to detecting? Start with
comingsoon.error: Something went wrong — tap to retry
foundernote.quote: I'm a detectorist and a designer who picked up coding along the way. I wanted an app that felt like it was made for detecting — not a hiking tracker with a new coat of paint. So I started building one for myself. Figured if I like using it, someone else might too.
showcase.label: Why Detectorists Love It
showcase.description: Every feature is built by a detectorist, for detectorists. No fluff. No generic GPS tracker pretending to be useful in the field.
showcase.forecast_description: Weather-based detecting score tells you if conditions are right. Soil moisture, wind, temperature, and precipitation — all analyzed into a single score so you never waste a trip.
showcase.offline_description: Download offline maps in 4 formats — Street, Satellite, Terrain, and Historical Topographic. Detect confidently in areas with zero cell coverage. Your maps stay on device.
showcase.nearby_title: History Is Closer Than You Think
showcase.nearby_description: Find nearby historic sites and Wikipedia landmarks around your position. Every old church, monument, and battlefield is a potential goldmine. Distance and directions included.
showcase.presets_description: Save, organize, and share your detector presets across 61 models from 12 brands. Keep up to 10 configurations ready and share them with fellow detectorists via QR code. Never forget your sweet settings again.
showcase.permission_title: Stay on the Right Side of the Law
showcase.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts, boundary maps, and automatic permission letters. The Permission Vault keeps you detecting legally.
showcase.backup_description: One-tap Google Drive backup for all sessions, presets, permits, and settings. Restore on any device. Lost phone? Broken phone? Your detecting history survives.
featuresall.label: What's Inside
featuresall.description: Every feature exists because it was needed on a real detecting session. Nothing here was added to pad a list.
featuresall.gps_description: Real-time satellite map with heading, altitude, speed, and distance overlay. Switch between Satellite, Terrain, Topographic, and Street views.
featuresall.cloud_description: One-tap Google Drive backup for all sessions, presets, permits, and settings. Lost phone? Restore everything on any device.
featuresall.track_subtitle: Load past tracks on your live map
featuresall.track_description: Load any of your past sessions onto the live map to see exactly which patches you already covered. Each track gets its own color so gaps are instantly visible.
featuresall.track_bullet1: 5 cycling colors — blue, orange, purple, yellow, teal
featuresall.track_bullet3: See uncovered patches at a glance
featuresall.perimeter_description: Draw any boundary polygon on the map. Get haptic vibration when approaching and an audio signal when you step outside. Stay within your permitted zone.
featuresall.perimeter_bullet1: Draw custom boundary polygons on map
featuresall.measure_description: Tap the map or drop a point at your GPS position to lay out a line. Tap point 1 again to close it into a polygon — perimeter and area are calculated instantly in hectares or acres using real spherical geometry. Drag any vertex to edit, tap a segment to insert a point, and undo or clear without leaving the map.
featuresall.saveguard_description: Save any measurement to the Library with a reverse-geocoded location name, or turn the drawn polygon into a Perimeter Guard in one tap — the measured shape becomes a haptic and audio fence while you detect.
featuresall.saveguard_bullet5: Audio alarm when outside the zone
featuresall.permission_description: Track landowner permissions with approval status, expiry alerts to your calendar, site boundaries, and automatic PDF permission letters.
featuresall.oldmap_description: Overlay genuine USGS historical topographic maps from the ArcGIS collection onto your modern map. Find old roads, buildings, and settlements that no longer exist.
featuresall.offline_description: Download map tiles for offline use. Street, Satellite, Terrain, and Historical Topo. Detect confidently with zero cell coverage.
featuresall.plus_heading: All the little things that make a big difference
featuresall.sec_findlogger_desc: Log every find with name, one of 6 types (Treasure, Gold, Coin, Relic, Jewelry, Trash), depth (0-40 cm slider), value, weight, notes, a photo, and an audio recording.
featuresall.sec_pindrop_desc: One tap drops a find pin at your current GPS position. Fill in the details later from the Finds list.
featuresall.sec_backtostart_desc: Toggle a line from your current position to your session start. The compass overlay adds a return-bearing arrow so you can walk it home.
featuresall.sec_sessioncompare_desc: Pick past sessions and compare them — overlay mode with a blend slider, or split view side by side.
featuresall.sec_presetslots_desc: Save up to 10 custom detector configurations and tap to activate. JSON import and export for sharing with friends.
featuresall.sec_export_desc: Export any session individually or in batch as GPX, KML, CSV, or SweepTrack JSON. Share or save to Downloads.
featuresall.sec_nightvision_desc: One-tap red monochromatic override on top of any theme. Preserves dark adaptation for dawn and dusk sessions.
featuresall.sec_compass_desc: Rotating compass dial with degrees, cardinal directions, and an optional green return-bearing arrow pointing back to your session start.
featuresall.sec_ruler_desc: 10 cm or 4 inch ruler along the screen edge with a 70-130% calibration slider so markings match your phone's real DPI.
featuresall.sec_forecast_desc: 0-100 Detecting Score for any location, any day up to a week ahead. Soil moisture, wind, temp, humidity, and smart tips in one screen.
featuresall.sec_tidetable_desc: Tide predictions from the nearest NOAA station. Pick 3, 7, or 14 day ranges. High/low times and heights grouped by day.
featuresall.sec_coincaliper_desc: On-screen measuring ring with DPI calibration. Matches against a built-in database of 131 coins across 9 regions — US, UK, Europe, Romania, Kreuzer, Asia, MEA, LATAM, Oceania.
featuresall.sec_nearbysites_desc: Historic POIs from OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia landmarks around your position. Split map + list view with distance and direct links to open them.
featuresall.sec_heatmap_desc: Rainbow density overlay of your current track. See which patches you've already covered and where the gaps are.
featuresall.sec_careerstats_desc: Filter by 1mo / 3mo / 6mo / 1yr / all-time. Sessions, finds, distance, duration, averages, personal bests, and a Top Sessions ranked list.
featuresall.sec_permissionletter_desc: Fill in your name and pick a permission entry — the app drafts a polite permission request letter to the landowner that you can copy or share.
featuresall.sec_sharecard_desc: Generate a shareable PNG session card with path preview, stats, and find breakdown.
featuresall.sec_summaryscore_desc: Every session ends with an animated 0-to-score counter, path preview, and the weather snapshot captured during the session.
featuresall.sec_colorpins_desc: Find markers are color-coded by type on the map: Treasure (amber), Gold (yellow), Coin (blue), Relic (brown), Jewelry (magenta), Trash (grey).
featuresall.sec_sessionmerge_desc: Select multiple sessions in the History screen and merge them into a single unified record with combined stats.
featuresall.sec_findsearch_desc: Text search across every find you've logged by name, notes, type, or session. Filter chips for all 6 find types.
featuresall.sec_elevation_desc: Per-session terrain chart with min, max, range, ascent, descent, and average elevation in meters or feet.
featuresall.sec_permitreminders_desc: Add any permission's expiry date to your phone's calendar with one tap from the Permission Vault.
featuresall.sec_photogallery_desc: 3-column grid of every find photo you've taken. Tap for a full-screen viewer with find name and type.
featuresall.sec_weathersnapshot_desc: Temperature, humidity, wind, and soil moisture are captured with every session and shown on the summary and share card.
featuresall.sec_autonamed_desc: Sessions are automatically named with a reverse-geocoded place label instead of raw GPS coordinates.
featuresall.sec_batchactions_desc: Multi-select sessions in History to rename (40-char limit), export, merge, compare, or delete in batches.
featuresall.sec_editfinds_desc: Every field on every find is editable — type, name, depth, value, weight, notes. Audio and photo playback in the detail view.
featuresall.sec_locationsearch_desc: Search any city, address, or place name from the Forecast, Nearby Sites, and Tide screens to plan detecting trips anywhere.
featuresall.sec_onboarding_desc: First-time walkthrough across Welcome, Intel, Field, Share, and Premium slides. Skip anytime.
featuresall.sec_languages_desc: Full UI in English or Romanian. Switch languages on the fly from Settings.
featuresall.sec_unitstoggle_desc: Switch distance, speed, altitude, and depth between metric (m/km/km/h/cm) and imperial (ft/mi/mph/in) from the home screen.
featuresall.sec_colorthemes_desc: Tactical, Amber, Cobalt, Coral, Fuchsia, Slate, Navy, Operator, Monochrome, Neon Plasma, Neon Toxic, and Neon Laser — grouped into Neutral, Feminine, Masculine, and Neon palettes.
featuresall.sec_detectorlib_desc: Built-in templates for 61 detector models across 12 brands — Minelab, XP, Nokta, Garrett, Fisher, Teknetics, Bounty Hunter, Quest, White's, Tesoro, Detech, Rutus.
featuresall.sec_about_desc: App version and built-with credits (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Google Maps, Open-Meteo, NOAA, Overpass/OSM).
featuresall.sec_feedback_desc: Send a bug report or feature request from Settings — opens a pre-filled email to support.
pricing.feat_measure: Measure Tool (distance + area, save, convert to guard)
pricing.feat_hud: Tactical HUD (time, dist, speed, alt, finds)
pricing.feat_findtypes: 6 Find Types (Treasure / Gold / Coin / Relic / Jewelry / Trash)

blog.cta_card_text: has every tool a detectorist needs — GPS tracking, permissions, forecast, offline maps, and more.
